SwYzpMIGqZY.title: [🔴AI동시통역] 제롬 파월 기조연설 생중계 | 미국 셧다운에 경제지표 '흔들' .. 금리 단서 공개하나? | SBS 실시간 라이브
SwYzpMIGqZY.description:
미국 연방준비제도(Fed) 의장 제롬 파월의 중요 기조연설이 오늘 예정되어 있습니다. 미국의 경제 상황과 금리 정책에 대한 핵심 전망을 전문가들이 주목하고 있으며, 연방 정부 셧다운 상황과 맞물려 금융시장의 긴장감도 고조되고 있습니다. 파월 의장의 발언은 글로벌 금융시장에 중요한 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다. SBS 뉴스에서 AI 통역과 함께 이번 중요 기조연설을 실시간으로 생중계해 드리겠습니다.

(AI동시통역 기획 개발 : 임태우 eight@sbs.co.kr)

IQL_lVcbO28.title: 대통령실 "마약외압 의혹 수사, 임은정이 최선 다하면 돼" / YTN
IQL_lVcbO28.description:
대통령실은 이른바 세관 마약 수사 외압 의혹 사건과 관련해, 임은정 서울동부지검장이 수사에 최선을 다하면 된다고 밝혔습니다.

김남준 대변인은 어제(14일) 브리핑에서, 동부지검이 백해룡 경정 수사팀을 별도로 구성하기로 한 것이 이재명 대통령의 지시에 부합하느냐는 질문에 이같이 답했습니다.

앞서 이 대통령은 세관 마약 수사 외압 의혹 사건에 대한 철저한 수사를 당부하며, 의혹의 피해자인 백 경정을 검경 합동 수사팀에 파견하라고 지시했습니다.

다만 동부지검은 공정성 논란을 의식해 별도 수사팀을 구성하고 백 경정이 피해자가 아닌 사건 수사를 맡기겠다고 공지했는데, 이 대통령은 수사팀의 문제보다 성역 없는 수사를 강조한 것으로 풀이됩니다.





YTN 홍민기 (hongmg1227@ytn.co.kr)

ZaxizPAN53c.description:
축구 대표팀이 오늘(14일) 파라과이와 평가전에서 2대0으로 이겼습니다. 특히 오늘 경기에선 이강인이 번뜩였습니다.이강인은 후반 30분, 상대 수비 2명이 둘러싼 상황에서 탈압박에 성공한 뒤 오현규를 향해 절묘한 침투 패스를 넣어 결정적 기회를 만들어냈습니다. 오현규는 그대로 공을 받아 골을 만들어냈습니다. 후반 투입된 이강인은 단번에 흐름을 바꾸는 패스들로 팬들의 환호성을 자아냈습니다.

7XZ0IpexvIM.title: Ketamine found on Jeju shore / KBS  2025.10.14.
7XZ0IpexvIM.description:
[Anchor]

Around the time the last Chuseok holiday began, a pile of trash washed up on the shores of Jeju, among which was 20 kilograms of ketamine classified as a narcotic.

This amount is enough for 660,000 people, equivalent to the entire population of Jeju, to use simultaneously, and the coast guard is investigating the source of the influx.

Reporter Na Jong-hoon has the story.

[Report]

At Gwangchigi Beach, where the World Natural Heritage Seongsan Ilchulbong can be seen at a glance.

On the 7th, an environmental protector cleaning up the beach discovered an unusually heavy trash bag.

Upon opening it, several brick-shaped unidentified objects wrapped in aluminum foil and transparent plastic were found inside.

The outer surface of the transparent plastic had the character '차' written in Chinese.

[Original Reporter/Voice Altered: "(It looked suspicious) so I opened it with a knife and it felt like saccharin. I saw an crystalline object and immediately reported it to the Seongsan Marine Police Station."]

After receiving the report, the coast guard requested a component analysis from the National Forensic Service, which confirmed it as 'ketamine'.

While it is used as a medical anesthetic, it is classified as a new drug due to its hallucinogenic effects.

The ketamine found in the bag weighed about 20 kg.

This is enough for 660,000 people to use based on a single dose, with a market value of approximately 6 billion won.

The coast guard conducted an emergency search of the nearby coastline but found nothing additional.

They are investigating whether the narcotics discovered this time were washed up from the open sea or if someone had deliberately left them there.

In Jeju, from March to June, 60 drug offenders were arrested for using or selling new drugs, including ketamine, in entertainment establishments.

This is KBS News, Na Jong-hoon.

t09xt7hx0zo.title: Cambodian caught smuggling new drug / KBS  2025.10.14.
t09xt7hx0zo.description:
[Anchor]

Meanwhile, a Cambodian man in his 30s has been caught smuggling and distributing a new type of liquid drug known as “Rush.”

With cases involving emerging drugs on the rise, authorities say stricter enforcement is urgently needed.

This is reporter Kim Ah-reu-nae.

[Report]

Investigators search a multi-family house where the Cambodian suspect in his 30s lives.

On the balcony, they find several cardboard boxes.

Inside the boxes are about a dozen small black glass bottles.

The bottles contain a liquid drug called “Rush,” a newly emerging narcotic.

It causes euphoria and excitement, and in severe cases, can lead to loss of consciousness. It has been designated as a temporary controlled substance.

The man attempted to disguise the drugs as cosmetics, but was caught through customs X-ray screening.

He had smuggled a total of 2.3 liters of Rush into the country through express cargo shipments on three separate occasions this year.

Some of it was sold domestically through chat apps and social media, under the direction of a Cambodian ringleader.

Distribution of new synthetic drugs like Rush has surged in Korea recently.

There were 430 cases detected in 2023, 515 last year, and as of August this year, 509 cases—already nearing last year’s total.

[Jung Kyo-jin/Investigation Division 2 Chief, Busan Main Customs: "(In particular) we have information that ‘Rush’ is being widely distributed in Southeast Asian countries, so we plan to strengthen intelligence analysis and enforcement."]

Busan Main Customs has detained the Cambodian suspect on charges of violating the Narcotics Control Act and handed him over to prosecutors.

A Vietnamese buyer of Rush was also referred to immigration authorities for deportation.

KBS News, Kim Ah-reu-nae.

▣ KBS 기사 원문보기 : http://news.kbs.co.kr/news/view.do?ncd=8380941

QT_P2fgvgoM.title: Heavy rains threaten harvest / KBS  2025.10.14.
QT_P2fgvgoM.description:
[Anchor]

Recently, heavy rainfall—almost like the monsoon season—has become a major source of concern for farmers.

As harvest season begins, the continuous rain has been spreading crop diseases.

This is reporter Kim Ye-eun.

[Report]

Rice ears that should have turned golden have instead become reddish-brown.

Leaves and stems are covered with dark spots.

Following the summer heat wave, the frequent rain has caused the spread of brown spot disease, a fungal disease.

It’s the peak harvest period, but with the fields still waterlogged, farmers are anxious.

[Ko Young-seop/Rice Farmer: "As you can see, the paddies are still full of water, so we can’t harvest. Even if we do, the yield won’t reach 50%."]

Cabbage, ahead of kimchi-making season, is also in crisis.

The humid weather has led to a surge in soft rot disease.

This is a cabbage field just weeks away from harvest.

Because the roots are exposed to rainwater, they have completely rotted.

Perilla leaves that should be green have turned black,

["They should ripen and turn yellow, but instead they suddenly turned like this…"]

and jujubes have become mushy, leaving farmers unable to harvest.

[Lee Jun-ja/Perilla and Jujube Farmer: "I was hoping to dry and keep whatever was still usable, but everything’s rotting like this. All our hard work has gone to waste."]

Since last month, Hongseong County in South Chungcheong Province has received 519 millimeters of rain—

nearly twice the average rainfall for the entire autumn season.

There have already been 24.5 days of rain, exceeding the usual total number of rainy days for fall.

With more rain forecast nationwide this week, there are growing concerns that it will affect both the harvest and vegetable prices ahead of kimchi-making season.

KBS News, Kim Ye-eun.

▣ KBS 기사 원문보기 : http://news.kbs.co.kr/news/view.do?ncd=8380932

IQw0uhthRCc.title: Jeon admits delivering gifts / KBS  2025.10.14.
IQw0uhthRCc.description:
[Anchor]

Jeon Seong-bae, a shaman known as “Geonjin," has admitted for the first time that he delivered luxury handbags and a diamond necklace—allegedly given by the Unification Church—to former First Lady Kim Keon-hee’s side.

The necklace, which had not appeared during the investigation, was reportedly returned by Kim’s side, according to Jeon.

Reporter Jung Hae-joo has more.

[Report]

The Unification Church is said to have handed Jeon two luxury handbags and a diamond necklace worth about 60 million won as gifts “for Kim Keon-hee,” along with a request for favors.

[Jeon Seong-bae/Aug. 2025: “(Did you deliver the gifts from the Unification Church to Kim Keon-hee?) …”]

At his first trial today (10.14), Jeon admitted for the first time that he delivered all the items to Kim’s side.

Until now, he had told investigators that the necklace had been “lost” after receiving it from the Unification Church. This is the first time he has acknowledged handing over the necklace as well.

Jeon’s lawyer stated, “In 2022, Jeon gave the handbags and necklace to Kim’s aide, Yoo Kyung-ok, under the understanding that they would be passed on to Kim.”

Jeon had previously claimed that he instructed Yoo to exchange the luxury handbags for other items at a store, but in court today, he stated that “Kim’s side returned both the exchanged items and the necklace last year.”

Former First Lady Kim is already facing allegations that she received another necklace and other gifts from Seohee Construction Chairman Lee Bong-kwan in 2022, known as the so-called “overseas tour necklace,” which she returned in Nov. 2023 after the “handbag video” scandal broke.

It is possible that she returned Jeon’s gifts around the same time.

Jeon’s defense argued that he was merely an intermediary, saying Kim was the “final recipient” of the gifts and that he should not be considered an accomplice.

The special counsel team investigating Kim Keon-hee plans to verify Jeon’s statements and trace the whereabouts of the necklace.

Kim’s side has responded, saying they are “hearing about this for the first time” and will contest the allegations in court.

This is Jung Hae-joo, KBS News.

▣ KBS 기사 원문보기 : http://news.kbs.co.kr/news/view.do?ncd=8380930

GcNxaaI25iE.title: Samsung posts record profit / KBS  2025.10.14.
GcNxaaI25iE.description:
[Anchor]

After struggling with sluggish performance for some time, Samsung Electronics has surprised the market with an operating profit exceeding 12 trillion won in the third quarter.

Its revenue also hit an all-time high, with analysts crediting the rebound of the semiconductor business as the key driver.

This is reporter Jung Jae-woo.

[Report]

In the second quarter, Samsung Electronics posted an operating profit of 4.6 trillion won, continuing a slump.

Just three months later, the company announced a dramatic turnaround—12.1 trillion won in operating profit, a 2.6-fold increase.

Sales reached 86 trillion won, setting a new record.

Rising prices of general-purpose memory semiconductors fueled the strong results.

The fixed price of DRAM, which was around 1 dollar in April, surpassed 6 dollars by September. High-end mobile DRAM prices also rose more than 14% during the third quarter.

Soaring demand for artificial intelligence (AI) chips pushed up overall memory semiconductor prices.

[Kim Yang-paeng/Research Fellow, Korea Institute for Industrial Economics and Trade: "As investment focuses on HBM (High Bandwidth Memory), companies can’t produce enough DRAM. That’s creating a supply shortage."]

The semiconductor division’s operating profit, which stood at 400 billion won last quarter, is estimated to have jumped to around 6 trillion won—allowing Samsung to reclaim the top spot in global memory market sales from SK hynix.

Experts predict that this upward momentum will continue for the time being,

driven by expanding sales of HBM, which had previously underperformed.

[Noh Geun-chang/Head of Research Center, Hyundai Motor Securities: "Although Samsung’s share of HBM production is smaller than competitors, its growth rate is quite high, so it’s expected to contribute starting in the fourth quarter."]

Amid the rebound, Samsung Electronics also announced a new stock compensation program to motivate employees—rewarding them with shares equivalent to the company’s stock price increase.

However, some internal voices criticized the plan as a “nominal reward,” since it assumes a more than 20% rise in the share price over the three years.

Samsung Electronics’ stock climbed to as high as 96,000 won during trading today (10.14), but later slipped due to ongoing U.S.-China tensions, closing at 91,600 won.

KBS News, Jung Jae-woo.

▣ KBS 기사 원문보기 : http://news.kbs.co.kr/news/view.do?ncd=8380928
